subcodes.title: Words to some Arab Muslims, spoken on 1915-03-15
subcodes.first_line: We do not teach these truths here because the inhabitants are still very remote from understanding these problems, but your questions led me into these unexpected domains of ideal mysteries.
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @empty learning; false spirituality, @limits of the intellect, @Manifestation of God as mediator
